title: Sangili Bungili Kadhava Thorae
desc: Vasu, a young broker, purchases a bungalow for his family in the outskirts of town. However, they soon start to feel the presence of supernatural forces in the building.

title: Comali
desc: A long coma leaves Ravi disorientated in an unrecognisable world. However, he sets out on a journey to reclaim his past and adapt to a new reality.

title: Gandhi Kannadi
desc: An event organizer orchestrates a grand diamond jubilee for an elderly gentleman. This profound assignment facilitates an unexpected journey involving sentimental aspirations and sincere bonds.

title: Kadaisi Ulaga Por
desc: In the year 2028, a power struggle on an international level creates political turmoil in India. Thamizh, a common man, rises to the occasion to save the day.

title: Nanban
desc: Two friends set out to find their friend from college, who taught them how to be more than just victims of circumstance. Along the way, they discover previously unknown truths.

title: Lift
desc: A man's first day on the job turns into a nightmare after some vengeful spirits begin to create trouble by trapping him in an elevator.

title: Oh Baby
desc: A seventy-year-old woman frustrated with her life, blames God for her misfortune. Subsequently, she magically transforms into a twenty-four-year-old after getting her photo taken at a studio.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Jaanu
desc: Ram and Jaanu are childhood sweethearts who meet at their school reunion after nearly two decades. Although initially awkward, they soon start recollecting their past and resolve their differences.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Amara Kaviyam
desc: Karthika and Jeeva, two college-going students, fall in love with each other but are forced to separate by their families. However, when they try to reunite, tragedy strikes.

title: Idharkuthane Aasaipattai Balakumara
desc: An idle youngster causes chaos in the life of a disciplined banker, whose struggles with his demanding boss are further complicated by the youth's carefree attitude.

title: Meiyazhagan
desc: Arul visits his hometown for a wedding. He meets a relative whose kindness helps him reconnect with forgotten family ties and precious memories.

title: Trigger
desc: An undercover police officer locks horns with a gangster after his adopted niece is kidnapped. Later he learns how the kidnappings of children are connected to his father, a former policeman.

title: Nela Ticket
desc: An orphan boy, Nela Ticket, is raised by Ananda Bhupathi at his orphanage in Bangalore. Years later, when Ananda is killed by a corrupt politician, Nela sets out to take revenge.

title: Airaa
desc: After fleeing to her grandmother's village, Yamuna is haunted by a spirit. Meanwhile, Amudhan, a fellow villager, investigates a series of murders occurring in the region.
